expectoration: profuse, like white of egg
weakness out of proportion to complaint

potency.chronic: 1M single dose, only under experienced practitioner supervision

keynotes.t: nausea and vomiting from motion, better from lying down with eyes closed
worse from any motion or even the thought of food
extreme sensitivity to noise (penetrates whole body)
sensation as if body made of glass
sensation of a thread in throat

potency.chronic: 1M single dose, only under experienced practitioner supervision

keynotes.t: delirium with congestion, staring wildly, muttering
worse from motion and stooping, worse lying down; full bounding then slow pulse
emaciation especially of legs while face remains fat
marasmus in children despite good appetite
dandruff with yellow scaly eruptions on scalp
third stage of inflammation, yellow discharge
worse in evening, worse warm room
hair falls out in patches, circular pattern
ringworm-like circular eruptions with offensive odor
catarrh of all mucous membranes, thick yellow discharge
slow healing wounds discharge yellow thick
second stage inflammation white grey exudate
worse in evening worse warm room
cramping spasmodic pain better warmth pressure
suppuration promotes expulsion of foreign body splinters

diseaseProtocols.name: IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome)

banerji.note: Widely used dual-remedy pairing for IBS with bloating and alternating bowel habit.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

eat: Soluble fiber - oats, banana, cooked vegetables
avoid: Raw salads and gas-forming foods (beans, cabbage)

diseaseProtocols.name: GERD (Acid Reflux)

banerji.note: Common dual-remedy split for reflux worse after meals and at night.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Phos 6X, 4 tablets after meals
tests: Upper GI endoscopy if persistent (>4 weeks)

diseaseProtocols.name: H. Pylori Infection

banerji.note: Adjunctive support pairing; confirm eradication with standard triple therapy and retesting.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily
tests: H. pylori stool antigen or urea breath test
Upper GI endoscopy with biopsy if alarm symptoms

diseaseProtocols.name: Chronic Constipation

banerji.note: Alumina for no urge with difficult straining; Hydrastis for sluggish digestion with constipation.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Mur 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily
tests: Abdominal examination / X-ray if long standing
Colonoscopy if red-flag symptoms (blood, weight loss, age >50)

eat: High fiber - whole grains, fruits with skin, flaxseed

diseaseProtocols.name: Malabsorption Syndrome

banerji.note: Constitutional plus digestive-support pairing for confirmed malabsorption picture.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily
tests: Serum vitamin B12, D, iron studies

eat: Cooked soft grains, khichdi, ripe banana
avoid: Heavy fried and very fatty food

diseaseProtocols.name: Migraine

banerji.note: Single constitutional dose typically preferred over dual for migraine; add Iris if biliary/visual aura present.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Mag Phos 6X, 4 tablets during acute pain, warm water
tests: MRI brain if red-flag features (sudden severe, neuro deficit)

eat: Regular meal timing, avoid skipping meals

diseaseProtocols.name: Urinary Tract Infection

banerji.morning: Cantharis 30, every 3 hours during acute burning
banerji.note: Repeat Cantharis through the day during acute phase; add Staphysagria for post-intercourse cystitis.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Ferrum Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

eat: Plenty of water, cranberry juice unsweetened
avoid: Spicy irritant food during acute phase

diseaseProtocols.name: Tonsillitis

banerji.evening: Hepar Sulph 200, if pus formation begins
banerji.note: Switch from Belladonna to Hepar Sulph as the picture moves from red/throbbing to suppurative.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Kali Mur 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Eczema / Chronic Skin Disease

banerji.evening: Rhus Tox 30, evening if intense itching at night
banerji.note: Confirm constitutional totality before committing to higher potency Sulphur.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Sulph 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

avoid: Common allergens - dairy, gluten if sensitive

diseaseProtocols.name: Insomnia

banerji.note: Coffea Cruda for over-active mind unable to switch off; Nux Vomica for insomnia from overwork or stimulant excess.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Kali Phos 6X, 4 tablets at bedtime
tests: Sleep study if suspected sleep apnea

eat: Warm milk, chamomile tea before bed

diseaseProtocols.name: Scarlet Fever

banerji.note: Classic remedy for the sudden high fever, bright red skin, and throat involvement of scarlet fever.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Ferrum Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

avoid: Hard or scratchy foods that irritate the throat

diseaseProtocols.name: Whooping Cough (Pertussis)

banerji.note: Classic remedy for the paroxysmal, spasmodic coughing fits of pertussis.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Mag Phos 6X, 4 tablets as needed during coughing fits
tests: PCR or culture for Bordetella pertussis

eat: Small frequent meals to avoid vomiting after coughing
avoid: Foods that trigger coughing (dry, crumbly foods)

diseaseProtocols.name: Mumps

banerji.note: For glandular swelling with salivation; Pulsatilla often used if testicular involvement in males.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Kali Mur 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

avoid: Sour or acidic foods that stimulate salivation and pain

diseaseProtocols.name: Chickenpox (Varicella)

banerji.note: For the intense itching and vesicular eruptions of chickenpox.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Kali Mur 6X + Kali Sulph 6X alternating, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Typhoid Fever

banerji.note: For the stupor, foul discharges, and prostration typical of typhoid.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Kali Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Malaria

banerji.note: Classic remedy for periodic fever with chill-heat-sweat stages and debility.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Mur 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily
tests: Peripheral blood smear for malaria parasite

avoid: Heavy, fatty foods during acute fever

diseaseProtocols.name: PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)

banerji.note: For irregular menses with indifference/exhaustion; Pulsatilla for milder, weepy presentations.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Hypothyroidism

banerji.note: For the chilly, sluggish, weight-gaining constitutional picture associated with hypothyroidism.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

avoid: Excessive raw cruciferous vegetables (goitrogens) in significant hypothyroidism

diseaseProtocols.name: Sciatica

banerji.note: Colocynthis for cramping pain better bending double; Magnesia Phosphorica for cramping, neuralgic pain better warmth and pressure.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Mag Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Osteoarthritis

banerji.note: For stiffness worse on first motion, better with continued movement — classic osteoarthritis pattern.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Fluor 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily
tests: ESR/CRP to rule out inflammatory arthritis

eat: Calcium and vitamin D rich foods

diseaseProtocols.name: Genital Warts / HPV

banerji.note: Widely documented Banerji protocol for genital and other warts; Nitric Acid for warts that bleed easily.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Sulph 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Kidney Stones (Renal Calculi)

banerji.morning: Berberis Vulgaris Q, 10 drops 3x daily in water
banerji.note: Classic remedy for renal colic with pain radiating down the ureter.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Phos 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

avoid: High oxalate foods (spinach, nuts) if calcium oxalate stones

diseaseProtocols.name: Common Warts

banerji.note: Antimonium Crudum favored for warts on palms/soles that are hard and horny.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Nat Sulph 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

diseaseProtocols.name: Sinusitis

banerji.note: Classic remedy for thick, stringy, ropy nasal discharge with sinus pressure.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Kali Mur 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily
tests: CT scan of sinuses if chronic/recurrent

eat: Warm fluids, steam inhalation with meals
avoid: Dairy (can thicken mucus in some people)

diseaseProtocols.name: Ganglion Cyst

banerji.note: Classic remedy for ganglion cysts and injuries to tendons/periosteum.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Calc Fluor 6X, 4 tablets 3x daily

avoid: Repetitive strain on the affected joint

diseaseProtocols.name: Arthritis (Rheumatoid)

banerji.note: Causticum for deformed joints with contracted tendons; Colchicum for intense pain worse on motion and touch, worse cold damp weather.

diseaseProtocols.name: Cough (Productive, Loose)

banerji.note: Antimonium Tart for loose rattling cough with little expectorated; Ipecac for cough with gagging and vomiting.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Select constitutional biochemic salts based on presenting symptoms
tests: Relevant investigations as indicated by presentation

diseaseProtocols.name: Cough (Dry, Irritating)

banerji.note: Bryonia for dry cough worse from any motion, holds chest; Drosera for dry spasmodic cough worse at night.

diseaseProtocols.name: Fever (General/Viral, Acute)

banerji.note: Arsenicum Album for fever with restlessness, chilliness, and prostration; Belladonna for sudden high fever with hot red face and throbbing.

diseaseProtocols.biochemic: Ferrum Phos 6X, 4 tablets every 2 hours during acute fever
tests: CBC if fever persists beyond 3 days
Consult a doctor for high or persistent fever, especially in children

avoid: Heavy, oily, or hard-to-digest food during acute fever
